description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this purple handbag from fastrack will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall or to college. And don't you be deceived by its compact look, for there's ample space to hold all your essentials! Height: 23 cm Width: 26 cm tapering Depth at base: 12.5 cm Made of nylon for durability and comfort One large zippered compartment with a small zippered pocket and an organiser pouch inside to stash away essentials One zippered roomy compartment at the back Single strap to hang the bag from the shoulder Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life Brand name printed with brand logo appliqué d on the front Brand tab appliqué d on the side Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
